import React from 'react'; import './DashboardPage.css'; const getGreeting = () => { const hour = new Date().getHours(); if (hour < 12) return 'Good morning'; if (hour < 17) return 'Good afternoon'; return 'Good evening'; }; const recentActivities = [ { icon: '📄', name: 'Proposal.pdf shared to Design Team', meta: '5 min ago', pill: 'completed' }, { icon: '📄', name: 'Report.xlsx downloaded', meta: '12 min ago', pill: 'downloaded' }, { icon: '📄', name: 'Contract.pdf shared to Legal', meta: '1 hr ago', pill: 'completed' }, { icon: '📄', name: 'Design assets uploaded', meta: '2 hrs ago', pill: 'completed' }, ]; const samplePeers = [ { name: 'John', device: "John's MacBook", online: true }, { name: 'Sarah', device: "Sarah's PC", online: true }, { name: 'Mike', device: "Mike's Laptop", online: true }, ]; const DashboardPage = ({ user, stats, peers, groups, activeTransfers, setView, selectGroup, fetchStats, formatSize, connectToPeer, }) => { const displayPeers = peers?.length > 0 ? peers.slice(0, 3).map((p, i) => ({ name: p.peerName || p.username || p.name || `Peer ${i + 1}`, device: p.device || `${p.peerName || 'Device'} ${i + 1}`, online: true, ...p, })) : samplePeers; const peersCount = peers?.length ?? 3; const firstName = user?.username?.split(' ')[0] || user?.username || 'User'; const greeting = `${getGreeting()}, ${firstName}! 👋`; const storageUsed = formatSize(stats?.storageUsed || 2576980378); const storageLimit = formatSize(stats?.storageLimit || 10 * 1024 * 1024 * 1024); const transferItem = activeTransfers?.[0] || { fileName: 'Proposal.pdf', progress: 65, status: 'Saving', }; return (

{greeting}

Here's what's happening with your P2P network today.

👥
{stats?.groupCount ?? 1} {(stats?.groupCount ?? 1)} active
📄
{stats?.fileCount ?? 12} +3 today
💻
{stats?.peersOnline ?? peersCount ?? 3} Connected
💾
{storageUsed} Used of {storageLimit}

Recent Activity

{recentActivities.map((a, i) => (
📄
{a.name} {a.meta}
{a.pill}
))}
Peers Online
{peersCount} connected
{displayPeers.map((p, i) => (
{p.name.charAt(0)}
{p.device} Online
))}

Upload Files to Peer

Send files directly to connected peers.

{transferItem.fileName}
{transferItem.status || 'Saving'} - {transferItem.progress ?? 65}%
Receiving: Design Team
); }; export default DashboardPage;
